name: alphagenome
description: AlphaGenome single-variant effect analysis — score non-coding variants for RNA-seq / DNase / ChIP / TF effects, splicing disruption, and ontology resolution. Vendored from the google-deepmind/science-skills bundle.
author: zorai

ALPHAGENOME_API_KEY.label: AlphaGenome API key
ALPHAGENOME_API_KEY.description: API key for the AlphaGenome service (https://deepmind.google.com/science/alphagenome/). Scripts load it via dotenv — never paste it into chat.

visualize-variant-effects.description: Visualize REF vs ALT allele effects across modalities (expression, regulatory, splicing) for a single variant. Produces matplotlib outputs in --output_dir.

python.command: python scripts/visualize_variant_effects.py --chrom "${AG_CHROM:?set AG_CHROM}" --pos "${AG_POS:?set AG_POS}" --ref "${AG_REF:?set AG_REF}" --alt "${AG_ALT:?set AG_ALT}" --gene "${AG_GENE:?set AG_GENE}" --ontology "${AG_ONTOLOGY:?set AG_ONTOLOGY}" --output_dir "${AG_OUTPUT_DIR:-./ag_output}" ${AG_TISSUE:+--tissue $AG_TISSUE} ${AG_TRACKS:+--tracks $AG_TRACKS} ${AG_TF:+--tf $AG_TF} ${AG_VIEW:+--view $AG_VIEW}

interpret-splicing.description: Quantitative splicing analysis (delta scores, junctions) for a single variant.

python.command: python scripts/interpret_splicing.py --chrom "${AG_CHROM:?set AG_CHROM}" --pos "${AG_POS:?set AG_POS}" --ref "${AG_REF:?set AG_REF}" --alt "${AG_ALT:?set AG_ALT}" --gene "${AG_GENE:?set AG_GENE}" --ontology "${AG_ONTOLOGY:?set AG_ONTOLOGY}" --output_dir "${AG_OUTPUT_DIR:-./ag_output}"

analyze-ism.description: In-Silico Mutagenesis SeqLogo generation for a variant and tissue.

python.command: python scripts/analyze_ism.py --chrom "${AG_CHROM:?set AG_CHROM}" --pos "${AG_POS:?set AG_POS}" --ref "${AG_REF:?set AG_REF}" --alt "${AG_ALT:?set AG_ALT}" --tissue "${AG_TISSUE:?set AG_TISSUE}" --ontology "${AG_ONTOLOGY:?set AG_ONTOLOGY}" --modality "${AG_MODALITY:-DNASE}" --output_dir "${AG_OUTPUT_DIR:-./ag_output}"

lookup-gene-info.description: Comprehensive gene and transcript lookup using local GTF data (offline, no external API).

resolve-ontology-terms.description: Resolve biological terms (e.g. 'liver', 'CD8 T cell') to UBERON / CL / EFO ontology CURIEs.

generate-ontology-mapping.description: Build a custom ontology mapping file from a set of tissue/cell-type terms.

python.command: python scripts/generate_ontology_mapping.py --input "${AG_INPUT:?set AG_INPUT (JSON file of terms)}" --output "${AG_OUTPUT_DIR:-./ag_output}/ontology_mapping.tsv"

visualize-genome-tracks.description: Genomic track visualization for a region (no variant — region-level view).

python.command: python scripts/visualize_genome_tracks.py --chrom "${AG_CHROM:?set AG_CHROM}" --start "${AG_START:?set AG_START}" --end "${AG_END:?set AG_END}" --ontology "${AG_ONTOLOGY:?set AG_ONTOLOGY}" --output_dir "${AG_OUTPUT_DIR:-./ag_output}"
